## Verification

- [ ] `python -m compileall src tests`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Manual smoke test, if behavior changed:

```powershell
evorig doctor
```

## Review Notes

- [ ] Add the repository's CodeRabbit-ignore tag or label before requesting review. CodeRabbit review is not needed during the early prototype.
